query: CREATE TABLE `asins` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `asin` varchar(16) NOT NULL, `name` varchar(280) NOT NULL, `category` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `tags` json NOT NULL, `verified` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true, `lastCheckedAt` timestamp NULL, CONSTRAINT `asins_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`), CONSTRAINT `asins_asin_unique` UNIQUE(`asin`)); CREATE TABLE `cron_runs` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `job` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `startedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `finishedAt` timestamp NULL, `ok` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false, `message` text, CONSTRAINT `cron_runs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`));
